name: SBC Benefic Janma Nakshatra Vehicle Muhurta Trigger
description: Sarvatobhadra Chakra (SBC) benefic transit over Janma Nakshatra and name consonants creates the exact auspicious muhurta for vehicle booking or delivery.

source_text.quote: Astrology has prescribed special muhurtas for each auspicious activity like entering a new house, marriage, buying vehicle and other things... In a SBC when some benefic grahas in motion transit Janmanakshatra and other consonants of native, create most auspicious Muhurtas for all types of activities.

all_of: Transiting benefic planets pass over the exact longitude of the native's Janma Nakshatra (birth star)
Transiting benefic planets align with the specific phonetic consonants of the native's name in the Sarvatobhadra Chakra (SBC)

interpretation.meaning: Using the Sarvatobhadra Chakra (SBC), the exact auspicious timing (Muhurta) for buying a vehicle or taking delivery is triggered when fast-moving benefic planets in transit activate both the native's birth star and the energetic phonetic syllables of their name.

metadata.notes: A micro-timing tool utilized specifically for scheduling the exact day of booking or buying a vehicle.
